title: Peak Seasonal Visa jobs :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Peak Seasonal Visa jobs
List of eligible jobs for the Peak Seasonal Visa (PSV), including ANZSCO codes and job requirements.

## Peak Seasonal Visa (PSV) requirements
To apply for 1 of these jobs, you must:
- have the relevant skills, experience and any other requirements of the job offered
- have a job offer for a seasonal job, and
- have a job offer from an employer accredited to hire workers under the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV) with an available PSV .
You can apply for a regular AEWV to work in 1 of these jobs if you will be employed outside the seasonal peak period.
There are additional requirements you and your employer will need to meet if you want to apply for an AEWV.
Accredited Employer Work Visa
Seasonal visa job durations and hiring months

### Peak Seasonal Visa (PSV) job list
Requirements for the job (if there are any)
Aquaculture Worker — Mussel Oyster Farm Worker only
Aquaculture Worker — Mussel Oyster Farm Worker only
Dairy Cattle Farm Worker — Calf Rearer
The job offer must involve assisting with daily tasks to do with calf rearing.  These may include: feeding administering mineral treatments moving and handling animals safely and preparing for transport.
The job offer must involve assisting with daily tasks to do with calf rearing.  These may include:
- administering mineral treatments
- moving and handling animals safely and preparing for transport.
Dairy Cattle Farm Worker — Relief Milker
The job offer must be for a role: on a dairy farm providing respite or relief to dairy farmers, or cover for dairy farm workers who are on leave or injured, and involving routine tasks on a dairy farm.
The job offer must be for a role:
- providing respite or relief to dairy farmers, or cover for dairy farm workers who are on leave or injured, and
- involving routine tasks on a dairy farm.
